hyperedges.label: Graphify Build Pipeline (detect → extract → cluster → report)
Query Subcommand Family (query/path/explain over existing graph)
Change-scoped CI/CD Deploy Pipeline (detect → build → pull/restart)
Compose service topology (api/web/admin behind nginx over db+redis)
Usage metering, billing and freemium epics

hyperedges.description: The unified question engine lifecycle: the question-engine design doc specifies it, the FEATURES catalog documents the shipped practice generator / shared grading / Elo-KT mastery / first-class flashcards, and the QA report's v2 checks verify it live — one design-to-verification thread beyond pairwise links.

The Uzbek-first language policy manifests cross-cuttingly: grading must fold Uzbek apostrophe variants, relative-time needs a manual formatter because ICU lacks uz data, and repeated QA sweeps closed hardcoded-English leaks on the primary audience's surfaces.

Findings deliberately deferred for human review as a group because each needs a schema migration, an API contract change, or touches hot auth/scoring paths — deemed unsafe to auto-apply in unattended QA runs.

hyperedges.label: Four-instrument QA documentation system (frontier ledger + EC spec + playbook + runbook + journal)
Finding promotion pipeline (evidence triple -> self-verification -> skeptic pass -> F<n>/O<n>)

nodes.label: Shrink Guard (refuse to clobber larger graph)
nodes.norm_label: shrink guard (refuse to clobber larger graph)

nodes.label: Debounce (waits for file activity to stop)
nodes.norm_label: debounce (waits for file activity to stop)

nodes.label: Deploy to VPS GitHub Actions Workflow
nodes.rationale: Triggers on push to main; concurrency group deploy-${ref} with cancel-in-progress:false serializes deploys so two runs never race the VPS mid-restart.
nodes.norm_label: deploy to vps github actions workflow

nodes.label: Detect Changed Apps Job
nodes.rationale: Decides which app images need rebuilding from the git diff; shared deps fan out (lockfile / packages/types / compose / workflow change rebuilds everything; packages/ui rebuilds web+admin; an api-only change builds just api) to avoid wasteful full rebuilds.

nodes.label: Build & Push GHCR Job
nodes.rationale: Builds only the changed images in parallel on a GitHub runner with a persistent GHA layer cache and pushes to GHCR so the 2GB VPS never builds anything; NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is inlined into web/admin client bundles at build time (the api Dockerfile ignores it).

nodes.label: VPS Pull & Restart Job
nodes.rationale: SSHes to the VPS, pulls :latest for the app tier only (db/redis/nginx are pinned public images — pulling them from Docker Hub every deploy intermittently failed on TLS timeouts and aborted the deploy), pulls images SEQUENTIALLY with 3 per-image retries because the 2GB VPS decompressing three Next.js images in parallel swaps and blows the timeout; 30m timeout (was 15m) since pulling all three fresh images can exceed 15m; docker compose up recreates only containers whose image digest changed.

nodes.label: API routes mounted at root; health is GET /health
nodes.norm_label: api routes mounted at root; health is get /health

nodes.label: Admin data layer (lib/api.ts Axios + hooks/useAdmin.ts + TanStack Query)
nodes.norm_label: admin data layer (lib/api.ts axios + hooks/useadmin.ts + tanstack query)

nodes.label: Single API process is also the Bull worker
nodes.norm_label: single api process is also the bull worker

nodes.label: Web data fetching (lib/api.ts axios + react-query hooks)
nodes.norm_label: web data fetching (lib/api.ts axios + react-query hooks)

nodes.label: Talim AI Feature Catalog
nodes.rationale: Map from features that exist today to the code implementing them; every entry verified against source. Conventions: API mounted at root (no /api prefix), isolation centralized in contentAccess.service.ts, barrel-split modules.

nodes.label: YouTube Import
nodes.rationale: Pulls captions when available or AI-transcribes, then treats the transcript like any other content so all downstream AI features work uniformly.

nodes.label: Hierarchical Sectioning (2-level chapter/subsection)
nodes.rationale: Sections drive navigation, assignment scoping, and progress tracking; self-relation parentId + depth on ContentSection.

nodes.label: Podcast Generation (TTS + Synced Transcript)
nodes.rationale: Segment timings derived from real per-segment TTS audio byte-lengths (Azure CBR) rescaled to true audio duration; legacy episodes without stored segments fall back to character-length estimation.

nodes.label: Practice Generator (Unified Questions + Flashcards)
nodes.rationale: ONE generator for all practice: count/types/depth/scope; quality pipeline = misconception distractors with per-option rationales, verbatim sourceQuote hallucination firewall, overgenerate then rule-filter then balanced shuffle, fill-to-count retry; legacy QUICK quiz kind retired; distinct from tenant assessments which share the same generation+grading engine but exclude FLASHCARD.

nodes.label: Elo-KT Section Mastery
nodes.rationale: Per (user, section): correct answers push up, wrong answers push DOWN, inactivity decays; bands gated by evidence so one right answer never shows a topic as learnt.

nodes.label: Flashcards as First-Class Question Type
nodes.rationale: FLASHCARD mixed INTO the same practice session, rendered reveal-the-back + self-grade (Bildim/Bilmadim), fed to mastery at half weight; removed from left-panel Resources; deck route kept alive for existing decks/bookmarks.

nodes.label: RAG AI Tutor Chat
nodes.rationale: Streaming tutor grounded in embedded chunks (OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, 1536 dims, pgvector); DeepSeek chat completions via OpenAI SDK.

nodes.label: AI Tutor Visuals (Manim render tool)
nodes.rationale: render_manim tool call: script validated, queued, rendered, served back as authenticated asset.

nodes.label: Question Banks (AI-Generated + Manual, Approve Flow)
nodes.rationale: Drafts move DRAFT to APPROVED/REJECTED; tutor builder is a 5-step wizard (Bank, Generate, Review, Publish, Assign).

nodes.label: GAME Assessment Mode (timer, speed points, streaks)
nodes.rationale: Speed-weighted, streak-multiplied points (GAME_BASE_POINTS 1000, speedFactor 0.5-1.0); streaks reset on wrong answer; the player renders and grades every structured type (previously some fell through to a plain text box scoring ~0).
nodes.norm_label: game assessment mode (timer, speed points, streaks)

nodes.label: Real-Time Class Leaderboard
nodes.rationale: On submit the API publishes a leaderboard.update job event; SSE via useJobEvents invalidates leaderboard queries so the table refreshes live.

nodes.label: 11-Type Question Grading Engine (packages/types/grading.ts)
nodes.rationale: gradeQuestion shared verbatim by API and web instant feedback; normalization folds Uzbek apostrophe variants + NFKC; NUMERIC tolerance max(0.001, 1% of answer); ORDERING partial credit pairwise (Kendall-tau); HOTSPOT and DRAG_DROP are manual-authoring only.

nodes.label: Multi-Tenant Isolation Guard (contentAccess.service)
nodes.rationale: Every content/assessment query scoped by role + ACTIVE membership through one central guard (assertCanAccessContent et al.); a deactivated learner loses content access immediately.

nodes.label: Custom Seat Limit
nodes.rationale: Seat capacity scales with student count; set by the admin at approval time, enforced when creating students.

nodes.label: Become-a-Tutor Request Flow
nodes.rationale: Learner requests upgrade; admin approval creates the org + ACTIVE subscription + optional seat limit — the human-in-the-loop replacement for self-serve tenant signup.

nodes.label: Manual Subscription Activation (no payment gateway)
nodes.rationale: No payment integration by design; SubscriptionSource today is always ADMIN; plans/prices exist (so'm, monthly + annual ~20% off) but activation is admin-driven.

nodes.label: Usage Metering & Quotas (ApiUsageEvent, enforceQuota)
nodes.rationale: Every metered AI action records an ApiUsageEvent; quotas enforced before expensive operations.

nodes.label: Usage-Limit Promotion Modal (402/413 error contract)
nodes.rationale: One app-wide modal instead of each call site failing silently or with ad-hoc text; API returns structured 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED / 413 PLAN_FILE_LIMIT / 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE with role-aware upgradePlanCode; web classifies modal vs inline by role + upgradePlanCode.

nodes.label: Admin One-Click User Impersonation
nodes.rationale: Short-lived (30 min) token carrying imp:true + impersonatorId, nothing persisted; admins cannot impersonate themselves or other admins.

nodes.label: Internationalization uz/en/ru (next-intl, web only)
nodes.rationale: Learner/B2C/tenant web app fully localized with [locale] segment; the admin app deliberately has no i18n; AI output is locale-aware (buildRagContext locale).

nodes.label: Background Jobs (Bull/Redis)
nodes.rationale: Heavy work runs off-request on Redis-backed Bull queues registered at boot: processContent, generateQuiz, generatePodcast, renderManim.

nodes.label: Barrel-Split Module Pattern
nodes.rationale: Larger backend modules live as folders re-exported through a barrel at the original path so imports stay stable while the module is split.

nodes.label: Talim AI Platform
nodes.rationale: Serves two audiences from one codebase (B2C individual learners; B2B tutors & schools); value proposition: instead of passively reading, learners get material explained, quizzed, narrated, and visualized by AI, and tutors get turnkey distribution + measurement without building AI plumbing.

nodes.label: UserRole Model (ADMIN / TENANT_OWNER / TENANT_LEARNER / INDIVIDUAL)
nodes.rationale: INDIVIDUAL is the default signup role; TENANT_OWNER is a learner promoted by admin approval and is the paying customer; TENANT_LEARNER reads only assigned material and never uploads; ADMIN operates the platform and is created only via script.

nodes.label: Manual Payment/Activation Model
nodes.rationale: There is no payment-gateway integration by design: a platform admin activates a paying customer by approving their tutor request and setting a seat limit, which provisions the organization and an ACTIVE subscription.

nodes.label: processContent Ingestion Job
nodes.rationale: PENDING → PROCESSING → READY/FAILED: extract text (YouTube transcript or PDF), chunk, embed with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small into pgvector, then generate structured sections (optionally a 2-level chapter→subsection outline).

nodes.label: Three-app Monorepo Architecture
nodes.rationale: pnpm + Turborepo with apps/web (Next.js 15, :3000), apps/admin (:3001, no i18n), apps/api (Express+Prisma+Bull, :4000, routes mounted at root with no /api prefix) plus shared @talim/types (must build first), @talim/ui, @talim/config.

nodes.label: Production Deployment Topology (nginx + Docker + GHCR)
nodes.rationale: All three apps plus Postgres, Redis, and nginx run as Docker containers; nginx terminates TLS and routes talim-ai.uz → web, admin.talim-ai.uz → admin, proxying API calls to api:4000; GitHub Actions deploys over SSH with Doppler prd secrets.

nodes.label: Question Engine Rework Design
nodes.rationale: Authoritative design for the unified question generation + evaluation engine, replacing the split B2C-quiz / flashcard / B2B-bank pipelines. Product-owner requirements: one generation surface, remove QUICK, type multi-select + count + depth instead of generic style, near-transfer questions (not parroting), honest evaluation where wrong answers push mastery down.

nodes.label: Unified Generation Parameters (count/types/depth/scope)
nodes.rationale: count 1-30 default 10; types multi-select replaces the single style select (style column kept for legacy rows); depth maps to Bloom bands with application triggering near-transfer prompting; B2C gains the full structured type set while HOTSPOT/DRAG_DROP stay manual-author only.

nodes.label: Question Generation Pipeline (overgenerate, filter, shuffle)
nodes.rationale: Shared by B2C generateQuiz.job and B2B banks.generateQuestions: per-locale-and-depth prompt, overgenerate ~1.5x, code-side rule filter (dedupe, drop parroting via 5-gram overlap, ban-list, answerability, sourceQuote fuzzy-match), balanced shuffle, trim to count honoring type/difficulty mix; LLM-declared difficulty seeds the Elo item prior.

nodes.label: Misconception-Derived Distractors
nodes.rationale: Each wrong option derived from a named realistic learner error; the label is stored per option and becomes targeted feedback when that option is picked (optionRationales).

nodes.label: SourceQuote Anchor (Hallucination Firewall)
nodes.rationale: Every item must carry a verbatim span from the context proving the correct answer; items whose sourceQuote doesn't fuzzy-match the context (normalized containment threshold) are rejected.

nodes.label: Near-Transfer Question Constraints
nodes.rationale: Stem must not reuse any 5-plus-word phrase from the source; application items are set in a scenario NOT in the source but the answer must be derivable from the source concept alone — questions must not just parrot the material.

nodes.label: Balanced Answer-Position Shuffle
nodes.rationale: Server-side option shuffle assigning correct answers an exactly-balanced position distribution — kills LLM key-position bias; never persist the model's option order.

nodes.label: Unified Grading Module (packages/types/grading.ts)
nodes.rationale: Single implementation used by the API (authoritative) and the web (instant practice feedback); superset-compatible with prior assessment/shared.ts and quiz.controller behavior.

nodes.label: Uzbek Apostrophe Normalization
nodes.rationale: trim, NFKC, locale-aware lowercase, fold apostrophe variants (U+02BB, U+02BC, curly quotes, backtick, acute) to U+0027, collapse whitespace, strip edge punctuation — critical because Uzbek Latin (o', g', tutuq belgisi) is typed many different ways.

nodes.label: Partial Credit Rules (creditFraction)
nodes.rationale: MULTIPLE_SELECT clamped hit-minus-wrong ratio (Moodle style); ORDERING pairwise Kendall-tau; MATCHING per-pair; FILL_BLANK/DROPDOWN_CLOZE per-blank; GAME mode stays all-or-nothing for leaderboard clarity; numeric tolerance abs floor keeps legacy behavior while the relative term fixes large-magnitude answers.

nodes.label: Elo-KT Mastery Model (SectionMastery, QuestionStat)
nodes.rationale: Per (user, section) theta clamped +-3 with lazy exponential decay (no cron), guess floors per type (0.25 MCQ, 0.5 T/F, ~0.05 structured, 0 free-text, 0.2 flashcard self-report), adaptive K, item difficulty co-updated; y uses graded credit so partial counts partially; GAME speed points stay a separate monotonic currency — mastery consumes correctness only. Migration must be hand-written additive SQL, never migrate diff (pgvector trap).

nodes.label: Evidence-Gated Mastery Bands
nodes.rationale: Bands (attempted/familiar/proficient/mastered) require score AND evidence gates (answer counts, activeDays) — modeled on Khan Academy bands and ALEKS re-checks; demotion by recompute with 3-point hysteresis; inactivity decay demotes at most to familiar; mastery can go down and the UI says why.

nodes.label: QuizKind QUICK Retirement
nodes.rationale: Quick questions not needed as a product surface; enum value stays in DB for old rows, UI stops offering it, controller rejects it; quickCheckAccuracy progress input degrades gracefully; old QUICK rows relabeled FULL by migration.

nodes.label: Flashcard Integration (FLASHCARD first-class type)
nodes.rationale: Flashcards were a silo (FlashcardDeck + separate page + own SM-2 state); v2 makes FLASHCARD a Prisma-enum question type generated in the SAME session as other types (B2C only), graded via known/unknown sentinel in the shared engine, fed to mastery at half weight with a 0.2 guess floor; the standalone SRS deck page stays for spaced review.

nodes.label: Fill-to-Count Retry Pass
nodes.rationale: Shipped after live VPS feedback (15 requested, 5 delivered): if quality filters leave a shortfall, a second pass re-prompts for the missing items with every kept stem listed as a forbidden repeat (avoidStems) plus a shared stem-dedupe set; postprocess returns a per-reason skip breakdown logged by both callers; failing request now delivers 15/15.

nodes.label: Stratified Whole-Material Chunk Spread
nodes.rationale: Title-similarity retrieval clustered at the intro and starved later sections (and the bank path's take-20-first had the same bias); whole-material context now samples an even spread of chunks sized to the requested count (~1.6x count, 12-30).

nodes.label: Inline Cloze (DropdownClozeInput)
nodes.rationale: Rebuilt twice on user feedback: from bare per-blank native selects to an inline sentence with numbered slot pills, then from a single active-blank chip row to one labeled chip row per blank — the active-blank indirection read as a single multiple choice and post-check hid all but the last blank's options; each row judged independently; QuizCard suppresses the plain stem so the sentence isn't rendered twice.

nodes.label: LaTeX Math Rendering Mandate
nodes.rationale: Prompts mandate dollar-delimited LaTeX for every formula (all locales); the shared RichText renderer normalizes backslash-paren delimiters to dollars and converts bare newlines to markdown hard breaks so multi-line stems don't collapse.

nodes.label: Numeric-Answer Verification (candidate second pass)
nodes.rationale: Known content-quality gap, not a UI/grading bug: model arithmetic in generated numeric cloze keys can be wrong (observed a blank keyed 5 where the numbers give 15); the sourceQuote firewall can't catch computed values, so a second-pass numeric-answer verification step in the generation pipeline is the candidate fix.

nodes.label: Moodle grading tolerances / QTI partial credit (reference)
nodes.norm_label: moodle grading tolerances / qti partial credit (reference)

nodes.label: Overnight Visual QA Report
nodes.rationale: Resumable unattended visual-QA program on branch claude/visual-qa: 17+ runs, findings F1-F75 logged as fixed or structurally deferred, all fixes verified live in-browser with full typecheck; prod next build deliberately never run because it would corrupt the running dev server's .next (the F1 wedge).

nodes.label: Resumable QA Checklist Methodology
nodes.rationale: Each resumed run picks up unchecked items instead of restarting from zero; per-run closing summaries track coverage added, fixes, logged items, and test-data left on the local dev DB (always restored where destructive).

nodes.label: QA Test Accounts (known credentials)
nodes.rationale: One fixture per role (ADMIN, TENANT_OWNER with org QA Academy + join code DUTDWE, two TENANT_LEARNERs incl. an email-less kid, INDIVIDUAL) so every surface can be driven as the real role.

nodes.label: Live Multi-Tenant Isolation Matrix (runs 4/8)
nodes.rationale: Crafted-token fetches (the real attacker surface) as every role: 40 checks, 0 leaks — same-tenant-unassigned 404s, cross-tenant IDOR 404s, learner mutations 403; deactivate-mid-session loses access on the unchanged token immediately, confirming the contentAccess.service.ts contract holds live, not just in code.

nodes.label: Hardcoded-English i18n Debt Closure
nodes.rationale: The Uzbek-first audience was seeing English on marquee surfaces (GAME player, leaderboard, assessments pages, learner dashboard, deck labels); ~90 new message keys x 3 locales added with ICU plurals, all validated through the next-intl formatter and verified live.

nodes.label: Stateless-JWT Staleness (F11/F45/F46)
nodes.rationale: Stateless JWT means a role change (tutor approval) leaves the old token 403ing on /tenant/* until re-login, and a password change never revokes old tokens; one tokenVersion fix would cover role-change staleness, password-change revocation, and logout — deferred because it touches the auth hot path, unsuitable for unattended runs.

nodes.label: Infinite-Spinner-on-Error Idiom (F68/F70/F71)
nodes.rationale: Recurring root cause in both apps: the isLoading-or-no-data-returns-Loading idiom + react-query retry:1 + no error.tsx boundary = infinite spinner or silent blank on any failed GET; fixed by adding isError branches across web and admin pages, verified with Playwright route-mocked 500s; a global error boundary (F69) remains logged.

nodes.label: Podcast Audio-Blob Churn (F21)
nodes.rationale: Playback never started because the audio-loading useEffect listed an unstable useCallback (flushProgress) in deps — every poll re-render revoked the current audio blob and created a new one, resetting the audio element; fixed by scoping the effect to the episode id with a stable ref + cancelled guard.

nodes.label: Orphaned Account on Seat-Full/Invalid-Code Register (F27/F43)
nodes.rationale: /auth/register creates the user before joinTenantByCode, so a seat-full or invalid-code join leaves a plain INDIVIDUAL account while the user thinks registration failed and can't reuse the email; invalid-code half fixed by pre-validating before user.create (F43), seat-full half remains structural (F27).

nodes.label: SSE Job-Events Stream (Run 9, replaces completion polling)
nodes.rationale: Replaced 3-5s refetchInterval polling in 8 hooks with one per-tab GET /events SSE stream pushing id-only job-completion events that drive invalidateQueries; polling demoted to a 30s safety net gated on !connected; per-user scoping verified (user A's event never reaches user B); events carry no content — the refetch re-runs assertCanAccessContent (defence in depth); JobEventBus hardened so a subscriber error never reaches the job.
nodes.norm_label: sse job-events stream (run 9, replaces completion polling)

nodes.label: Destructive-Token Dark Contrast (F73/F75)
nodes.rationale: The shadcn dark --destructive is a fill color; admin uses it only as text (2.18:1, failed AA) so a one-line lighten fixed it (5.66:1); web uses the same token for BOTH text (sub-AA ~3:1) and fills (white-on-fill 5.45:1 passes), so a single-token fix can't satisfy both — the proper fix is a token split (dedicated --destructive-text), a design call logged as structural.

nodes.label: GAME Timings Cheat (F39)
nodes.rationale: computeGamePoints trusts the client-supplied responseMs (speedFactor 1.0 at timings:0) with no server clock, so game speed points are client-spoofable; structural scoring-path change, logged for human review.

nodes.label: Quiz Generation Staleness Check (F59)
nodes.rationale: Quiz has no status column so a failed/0-question generation had nowhere to persist FAILED and the UI spun forever; fixed WITHOUT a schema migration via a self-correcting staleness check (0 questions + older than the 120s generation window flips to a failed state) because migrations on the drift-prone dev DB are the riskiest unattended change; persisted Quiz.status remains the ideal fix, deferred.

nodes.label: Uzbek Relative-Time Formatting (F18)
nodes.rationale: Intl.RelativeTimeFormat('uz') resolves but ICU (V8/Node) ships no Uzbek relative-time data, so timestamps rendered raw fallback like '-3 w' to the primary Uzbek audience; fixed by formatting Uzbek manually (lib/format-relative-time.ts) while keeping Intl for en/ru.

nodes.label: Frontier-Map + Adversarial Code-Verification Method
nodes.rationale: Multi-agent frontier map ranks the genuinely-untested live-runnable stories across the 76-story backlog vs the done-ledger; adversarial graphify-first code-verification agents confirm or refute suspected bugs with file:line; each confirmed bug is then reproduced, fixed, and re-verified live before commit.

nodes.label: API Error-Code Contract Need (F62)
nodes.rationale: Owner/learner mutation surfaces prefer the raw English server message over the localized fallback; unlike login/register (2-3 clean status codes mappable client-side), these endpoints emit many distinct free-text 400s, so a proper fix needs an API error-code contract (codes to message keys) — structural, logged for human review.

nodes.label: Admin Credential Autofill Leak (F25)
nodes.rationale: Admin user-detail credential inputs lacked autoComplete, so Chrome silently pre-filled the operator's own saved login into the target user's password/note fields — saving would overwrite the target's credentials with the admin's own (credential leak + silent password change); fixed with autoComplete off/new-password.

nodes.label: Practice Generator v2 Live Checks (2026-07-12)
nodes.rationale: Live verification of the question-engine v2 ships: fill-to-count delivers 15/15 (was 5/15), inline FLASHCARD items with honest self-report grading moving mastery down, whole-material stratified spread attributing questions across 4 sections, LaTeX normalization rendering via KaTeX, inline-cloze per-blank rows; open regression watch: requested-type balance is best-effort (a type can come back with 0 items).

links.source_location: Run 9 (same SSE/useJobEvents mechanism as live leaderboard)
Run 4 (verify the contentAccess.service.ts isolation contract live)
Run 14, F62 (both hinge on structured API error contracts driving localized UI; the 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED contract is the existing precedent)
Run 5, F18 (both are Uzbek-first gaps in standard i18n infrastructure)
Practice generator v2 checks (stratified chunk spread + sourceQuote provenance)
Practice generator v2 checks (LaTeX normalizes, KaTeX renders)
Run 13 method (frontier map ranks against the done-ledger/checklist)
Run 16 F68 (same class as the already-fixed F8 and F59)

hyperedges.label: Graphify Build Pipeline (detect → extract → cluster → report)
Query Subcommand Family (query/path/explain over existing graph)
Change-scoped CI/CD Deploy Pipeline (detect → build → pull/restart)
Compose service topology (api/web/admin behind nginx over db+redis)
Usage metering, billing and freemium epics

hyperedges.description: The unified question engine lifecycle: the question-engine design doc specifies it, the FEATURES catalog documents the shipped practice generator / shared grading / Elo-KT mastery / first-class flashcards, and the QA report's v2 checks verify it live — one design-to-verification thread beyond pairwise links.

The Uzbek-first language policy manifests cross-cuttingly: grading must fold Uzbek apostrophe variants, relative-time needs a manual formatter because ICU lacks uz data, and repeated QA sweeps closed hardcoded-English leaks on the primary audience's surfaces.

Findings deliberately deferred for human review as a group because each needs a schema migration, an API contract change, or touches hot auth/scoring paths — deemed unsafe to auto-apply in unattended QA runs.

hyperedges.label: Four-instrument QA documentation system (frontier ledger + EC spec + playbook + runbook + journal)
Finding promotion pipeline (evidence triple -> self-verification -> skeptic pass -> F<n>/O<n>)
